title: Add a `machine` configuration for CA certificates import
body:
Introducing a new `machine` configuration, `import_native_ca`, to specify if the machine, at startup, will import the host-trusted CA certificates. 

It is set to `false` by default.

Related epic https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RUN-4045

The design is described [here](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/contrib/design-docs/import-ca-certs.md) and was approved with PR #27939

This PR blocks https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28336

comments.body: (I think this should merge after #713, but I’ll be fine with merging now if others prefer it the other way.)
